name: cybersecurity-starter
description: Starter external plugin pack for cybersecurity-oriented workflows

performance.name: finding-signal-quality
performance.description: Generate high-signal, reproducible findings with clear evidence
success_criteria: Findings include target, vector, and impact
Each finding includes at least one evidence artifact

performance.name: evidence-completeness
performance.description: Maintain evidence references and reproducible validation records
success_criteria: Validated findings include evidence and repro steps
Evidence artifacts are linked by finding ID
Report output includes evidence index metadata

performance.name: false-positive-control
performance.description: Avoid speculative claims and clearly mark confidence

performance.name: passive-first-safety
performance.description: Keep assessments passive-first and non-destructive by default
success_criteria: No active exploitation is attempted by default
Recon outputs are clearly marked passive

environment.name: security-assessment-workspace
environment.description: Repository and textual inputs used to triage and report cybersecurity findings

actuators.name: cyber_surface_map
actuators.description: Build passive asset and surface map from target inputs

actuators.name: cyber_endpoint_inventory
actuators.description: Build passive endpoint inventory from hints and common paths

actuators.name: cyber_tech_fingerprint
actuators.description: Classify technology stack hints into passive fingerprint signals

actuators.name: cyber_triage
actuators.description: Convert raw observations into structured candidate findings

actuators.name: cyber_hypothesis_generate
actuators.description: Generate passive validation hypotheses from findings

actuators.name: cyber_validate_finding
actuators.description: Validate findings with passive evidence and reproducibility checks

actuators.name: cyber_report_outline
actuators.description: Build a concise security report outline from findings

actuators.name: cyber_report_draft
actuators.description: Prepare report draft metadata from validated findings

actuators.name: cyber_report_evidence_pack
actuators.description: Build an evidence index mapped to finding identifiers

actuators.name: cyber_report_exec_summary
actuators.description: Generate executive summary metrics for security reports
